result.summary: Found 2 issues: a major text truncation in the header navigation and a minor layout inconsistency with game card visibility.

issues.description: The 'Hot Garr' tab text in the top navigation appears truncated or incomplete, likely should display a full label like 'Hot Games' or similar
issues.suggestion: Check the CSS width constraints on the navigation tabs or adjust the text label to fit properly within its container. Consider using text overflow ellipsis or adjusting font size if needed.

issues.description: The rightmost game card in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections appears to be partially cut off on the right edge
issues.suggestion: Verify the carousel/grid container width and padding to ensure all visible cards are fully displayed. Consider adjusting the number of cards shown per row or the card width for better responsiveness.
